basic_details.job_title: IIT Guwahati Project Technician Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati) Project Technician Notification 2026 has been released on the official website iitg.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Guwahati Project Technician Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B Tech in Chemical or Mechanical Engineering with Experience in CFD Modelling
qualification.details: Project Technician: B Tech in Chemical or Mechanical Engineering with Experience in CFD Modelling

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Project Technician Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Guwahati Project Technician Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Project Technician Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Guwahati Project Technician recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Technician position at IIT Guwahati is 18th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Technician post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a B.Tech degree in Chemical or Mechanical Engineering and have prior experience in CFD Modelling to be eligible for this role.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Project Technician position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Technician post announced by IIT Guwahati in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Technician role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Technician position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 22,490 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Technician position at IIT Guwahati will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Project Technician position at IIT Guwahati is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Guwahati located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati is located in Guwahati, Assam, with the pincode 781039.

faq.question: Q9. What is the date of the interview for the Project Technician post?
faq.answer: The interview for the Project Technician position is scheduled to be held on 20th July 2026.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the IIT Guwahati Project Technician recruitment?
faq.answer: You can apply online through the official website of IIT Guwahati or via the direct application link provided in the important links section before the last date.
